content: CPU INT4/INT8 inference infra 2025-2026: torchao (PyTorch-native, Int4WeightOnlyConfig group128, Int8DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig for x86 CPU; needs AMX/AVX512 + torch.compile), optimum-quanto (int2-int8, torch.compile, device-agnostic, QAT), Intel AutoRound, llama.cpp GGUF (pure C++, best CPU throughput). All require torch or C++ — none pure-Python NumPy. Project's CPU path is unique but ~2-3x slower than llama.cpp.
